docs.title: ACCESS Notification Catalog
docs.text: Welcome to the ACCESS Notification Catalog — an auto-generated reference of all automated notifications sent from ConnectCI portals.

docs.title: Overview
docs.text: This catalog is automatically generated from the ConnectCI Drupal application and deployed to GitHub Pages. Each section documents the notifications sent by a specific portal or service area.

docs.title: Sections
docs.text:
• ACCESS Support — Notifications from the ACCESS Support portal
  • Campus Champions — Notifications from the Campus Champions portal
  • CCMNet — Notifications from the CCMNet portal
  • Open OnDemand — Notifications from the Open OnDemand portal
  • PAScience — Notifications from the PAScience portal
  • Shared — Notifications shared across multiple portals

Use the navigation above to browse notifications by portal.

docs.title: Email to Submitter (join_ccmnet)
docs.text:
Field Value Portals access-support, campus-champions, ccmnet, open-ondemand, pascience Trigger webform submission Send Method email Timing immediate Recipient [webform_submission:values:email:raw] Recipient Role any Subject Thank you for joining the CCMNet! Body

Dear {{ webform_token('[webform_submission:values:name]', webform_submission, [], options) }},

Thank you for your interest in the Cyberinfrastructure Community-wide Mentorship Network (CCMNet) and for joining our mentorship program! We are building the framework for community interaction, leveraging existing community platforms, and tailoring them to our vision of CCMNet’s community mentorship initiative.

We will provide occasional progress updates via email and welcome your input, experience, and ideas to help foster growth within our mentorship program. We will announce our official launch when our platform is ready, and we are poised to begin mentor-matching services.

We look forward to working together in the very near future!

Sincerely, The CCMNet Team

https://ccmnet.org/

Edit Location config: webform.webform.join_ccmnet.yml Is Shared yes Needs Review no

docs.title: Welcome to CSSN (join_the_cssn_network)
docs.text:
Field Value Portals access-support, campus-champions, ccmnet, open-ondemand, pascience Trigger webform submission Send Method email Timing immediate Recipient [current-user:mail] Recipient Role any Subject _default Body

Hello [current-user:display-name]!

We recently added a CSSN Directory.

  • Update your skills, add a photo, and a bio on your Community Persona page. (Also found in the My ACCESS menu when you are logged in.)

Check out the new CSSN Directory

Join Affinity Groups or start a new group

  • Join groups of people within ACCESS that share common interests and find the best links to active communication channels, documentation, news, and events specific to each group.
  • Start a new group around a topic of interest, and request a member email list if benefits the group.

Explore Affinity Groups

Engage with the community and earn Travel Grants with CCEP

  • The CSSN Community Engagement Program (CCEP) gives $3K travel grants for feedback forums, documentation, and much more!

I want a travel grant!

Find tutorials, documentation, and training in Knowledge Base Resources

Start learning

MATCH Engagements for your compute and research needs

  • Interested in being a mentor or student? Ensure that you check the corresponding box.
  • You’ll be able to help a researcher with coding help or transitioning work to an ACCESS system. The typical duration is 3-6 months.

Find out more

Thanks for being a part of the CSSN!

Alana RomanellaACCESS Support

Edit Location config: webform.webform.join_the_cssn_network.yml Is Shared yes Needs Review no

docs.title: Email to Submitter (join_ccmnet)
docs.text:
Field Value Portals access-support, campus-champions, ccmnet, open-ondemand, pascience Trigger webform submission Send Method email Timing immediate Recipient [webform_submission:values:email:raw] Recipient Role any Subject Thank you for joining the CCMNet! Body

Dear {{ webform_token('[webform_submission:values:name]', webform_submission, [], options) }},

Thank you for your interest in the Cyberinfrastructure Community-wide Mentorship Network (CCMNet) and for joining our mentorship program! We are building the framework for community interaction, leveraging existing community platforms, and tailoring them to our vision of CCMNet’s community mentorship initiative.

We will provide occasional progress updates via email and welcome your input, experience, and ideas to help foster growth within our mentorship program. We will announce our official launch when our platform is ready, and we are poised to begin mentor-matching services.

We look forward to working together in the very near future!

Sincerely, The CCMNet Team

https://ccmnet.org/

Edit Location config: webform.webform.join_ccmnet.yml Is Shared yes Needs Review no

docs.title: Welcome to CSSN (join_the_cssn_network)
docs.text:
Field Value Portals access-support, campus-champions, ccmnet, open-ondemand, pascience Trigger webform submission Send Method email Timing immediate Recipient [current-user:mail] Recipient Role any Subject _default Body

Hello [current-user:display-name]!

We recently added a CSSN Directory.

  • Update your skills, add a photo, and a bio on your Community Persona page. (Also found in the My ACCESS menu when you are logged in.)

Check out the new CSSN Directory

Join Affinity Groups or start a new group

  • Join groups of people within ACCESS that share common interests and find the best links to active communication channels, documentation, news, and events specific to each group.
  • Start a new group around a topic of interest, and request a member email list if benefits the group.

Explore Affinity Groups

Engage with the community and earn Travel Grants with CCEP

  • The CSSN Community Engagement Program (CCEP) gives $3K travel grants for feedback forums, documentation, and much more!

I want a travel grant!

Find tutorials, documentation, and training in Knowledge Base Resources

Start learning

MATCH Engagements for your compute and research needs

  • Interested in being a mentor or student? Ensure that you check the corresponding box.
  • You’ll be able to help a researcher with coding help or transitioning work to an ACCESS system. The typical duration is 3-6 months.

Find out more

Thanks for being a part of the CSSN!

Alana RomanellaACCESS Support

Edit Location config: webform.webform.join_the_cssn_network.yml Is Shared yes Needs Review no

docs.title: ccmnet_welcome
docs.text: Field Value Portals ccmnet Trigger user action / system event Send Method email Timing cron Recipient specific user Recipient Role authenticated Subject Welcome to CCMNet (Cyberinfrastructure Community-Wide Mentorship Network) Body Welcome to CCMNet (Cyberinfrastructure Community-Wide Mentorship Network)We are excited to have you join our network of mentors and mentees committed to learning, growing, and supporting each other. Whether you are a seasoned professional looking to share your knowledge and expertise or a mentee seeking guidance and mentorship, you are now part of a supportive community dedicated to personal and professional development.As part of this program, we would like to gather your profile information (persona) to match a mentor or mentee and to benefit from your community participation. Please look at your persona and use the Edit Persona button to update skills, and add a bio, and photo.You will be added to the CCMNet Affinity Group. Members of the CCMnet Affinity Group will receive periodic email notifications about mentorship opportunities and other news.Thank you for being so committed to supporting each other and contributing to a culture of learning and growth. We look forward to seeing your positive impact and the connections you forge within the community.If you have any questions, ideas, or suggestions for how we can enhance the mentorship community experience, please don't hesitate to contact our project team. Your feedback is always welcome and appreciated.Once again, welcome to the Cyberinfrastructure Community-Wide Mentorship Network!Best regards,CCMNet Project team Edit Location config: symfony_mailer.mailer_policy.ccmnet.ccmnet_welcome.yml Is Shared no Needs Review no

docs.title: Email to Submitter (join_ccmnet)
docs.text:
Field Value Portals access-support, campus-champions, ccmnet, open-ondemand, pascience Trigger webform submission Send Method email Timing immediate Recipient [webform_submission:values:email:raw] Recipient Role any Subject Thank you for joining the CCMNet! Body

Dear {{ webform_token('[webform_submission:values:name]', webform_submission, [], options) }},

Thank you for your interest in the Cyberinfrastructure Community-wide Mentorship Network (CCMNet) and for joining our mentorship program! We are building the framework for community interaction, leveraging existing community platforms, and tailoring them to our vision of CCMNet’s community mentorship initiative.

We will provide occasional progress updates via email and welcome your input, experience, and ideas to help foster growth within our mentorship program. We will announce our official launch when our platform is ready, and we are poised to begin mentor-matching services.

We look forward to working together in the very near future!

Sincerely, The CCMNet Team

https://ccmnet.org/

docs.title: Welcome to CSSN (join_the_cssn_network)
docs.text:
Field Value Portals access-support, campus-champions, ccmnet, open-ondemand, pascience Trigger webform submission Send Method email Timing immediate Recipient [current-user:mail] Recipient Role any Subject _default Body

Hello [current-user:display-name]!

We recently added a CSSN Directory.

  • Update your skills, add a photo, and a bio on your Community Persona page. (Also found in the My ACCESS menu when you are logged in.)

Check out the new CSSN Directory

Join Affinity Groups or start a new group

  • Join groups of people within ACCESS that share common interests and find the best links to active communication channels, documentation, news, and events specific to each group.
  • Start a new group around a topic of interest, and request a member email list if benefits the group.

Explore Affinity Groups

Engage with the community and earn Travel Grants with CCEP

  • The CSSN Community Engagement Program (CCEP) gives $3K travel grants for feedback forums, documentation, and much more!

I want a travel grant!

Find tutorials, documentation, and training in Knowledge Base Resources

Start learning

MATCH Engagements for your compute and research needs

  • Interested in being a mentor or student? Ensure that you check the corresponding box.
  • You’ll be able to help a researcher with coding help or transitioning work to an ACCESS system. The typical duration is 3-6 months.

Find out more

Thanks for being a part of the CSSN!

Alana RomanellaACCESS Support

Edit Location config: webform.webform.join_the_cssn_network.yml Is Shared yes Needs Review no

docs.title: Email to Submitter (join_ccmnet)
docs.text:
Field Value Portals access-support, campus-champions, ccmnet, open-ondemand, pascience Trigger webform submission Send Method email Timing immediate Recipient [webform_submission:values:email:raw] Recipient Role any Subject Thank you for joining the CCMNet! Body

Dear {{ webform_token('[webform_submission:values:name]', webform_submission, [], options) }},

Thank you for your interest in the Cyberinfrastructure Community-wide Mentorship Network (CCMNet) and for joining our mentorship program! We are building the framework for community interaction, leveraging existing community platforms, and tailoring them to our vision of CCMNet’s community mentorship initiative.

We will provide occasional progress updates via email and welcome your input, experience, and ideas to help foster growth within our mentorship program. We will announce our official launch when our platform is ready, and we are poised to begin mentor-matching services.

We look forward to working together in the very near future!

Sincerely, The CCMNet Team

https://ccmnet.org/

docs.title: Welcome to CSSN (join_the_cssn_network)
docs.text:
Field Value Portals access-support, campus-champions, ccmnet, open-ondemand, pascience Trigger webform submission Send Method email Timing immediate Recipient [current-user:mail] Recipient Role any Subject _default Body

Hello [current-user:display-name]!

We recently added a CSSN Directory.

  • Update your skills, add a photo, and a bio on your Community Persona page. (Also found in the My ACCESS menu when you are logged in.)

Check out the new CSSN Directory

Join Affinity Groups or start a new group

  • Join groups of people within ACCESS that share common interests and find the best links to active communication channels, documentation, news, and events specific to each group.
  • Start a new group around a topic of interest, and request a member email list if benefits the group.

Explore Affinity Groups

Engage with the community and earn Travel Grants with CCEP

  • The CSSN Community Engagement Program (CCEP) gives $3K travel grants for feedback forums, documentation, and much more!

I want a travel grant!

Find tutorials, documentation, and training in Knowledge Base Resources

Start learning

MATCH Engagements for your compute and research needs

  • Interested in being a mentor or student? Ensure that you check the corresponding box.
  • You’ll be able to help a researcher with coding help or transitioning work to an ACCESS system. The typical duration is 3-6 months.

Find out more

Thanks for being a part of the CSSN!

Alana RomanellaACCESS Support

Edit Location config: webform.webform.join_the_cssn_network.yml Is Shared yes Needs Review no

docs.title: Email to Submitter (join_ccmnet)
docs.text:
Field Value Portals access-support, campus-champions, ccmnet, open-ondemand, pascience Trigger webform submission Send Method email Timing immediate Recipient [webform_submission:values:email:raw] Recipient Role any Subject Thank you for joining the CCMNet! Body

Dear {{ webform_token('[webform_submission:values:name]', webform_submission, [], options) }},

Thank you for your interest in the Cyberinfrastructure Community-wide Mentorship Network (CCMNet) and for joining our mentorship program! We are building the framework for community interaction, leveraging existing community platforms, and tailoring them to our vision of CCMNet’s community mentorship initiative.

We will provide occasional progress updates via email and welcome your input, experience, and ideas to help foster growth within our mentorship program. We will announce our official launch when our platform is ready, and we are poised to begin mentor-matching services.

We look forward to working together in the very near future!

Sincerely, The CCMNet Team

https://ccmnet.org/

docs.title: Welcome to CSSN (join_the_cssn_network)
docs.text:
Field Value Portals access-support, campus-champions, ccmnet, open-ondemand, pascience Trigger webform submission Send Method email Timing immediate Recipient [current-user:mail] Recipient Role any Subject _default Body

Hello [current-user:display-name]!

We recently added a CSSN Directory.

  • Update your skills, add a photo, and a bio on your Community Persona page. (Also found in the My ACCESS menu when you are logged in.)

Check out the new CSSN Directory

Join Affinity Groups or start a new group

  • Join groups of people within ACCESS that share common interests and find the best links to active communication channels, documentation, news, and events specific to each group.
  • Start a new group around a topic of interest, and request a member email list if benefits the group.

Explore Affinity Groups

Engage with the community and earn Travel Grants with CCEP

  • The CSSN Community Engagement Program (CCEP) gives $3K travel grants for feedback forums, documentation, and much more!

I want a travel grant!

Find tutorials, documentation, and training in Knowledge Base Resources

Start learning

MATCH Engagements for your compute and research needs

  • Interested in being a mentor or student? Ensure that you check the corresponding box.
  • You’ll be able to help a researcher with coding help or transitioning work to an ACCESS system. The typical duration is 3-6 months.

Find out more

Thanks for being a part of the CSSN!

Alana RomanellaACCESS Support

Edit Location config: webform.webform.join_the_cssn_network.yml Is Shared yes Needs Review no
